title: Bare except clauses across camera drivers
description: Multiple camera drivers use bare 'except:' - simulated.py:11, mindvision.py:20, imagingsource.py, flir.py, basler.py, alliedvision.py, camera.py, instrumental.py. Replace with appropriate typed exceptions (ImportError for import blocks, Exception for others). 62 total bare excepts across 24 files.
swarm_id: Fixing bare except clauses across all camera/SLM drivers
